scenario-title: Evidence at deadline boundary — submit_evidence exactly at evidence-window-duration deadline
scenario-purpose: Verify boundary behaviour: evidence submitted exactly when block-time equals dispute-raise-time + evidence-window-duration is accepted (deadline is exclusive: evidence at deadline is still within the window).
scenario-notes: evidence-window-duration=60s. Dispute raised at t=1060, deadline = 1060+60=1120. Evidence at t=1120 equals the deadline exactly. The guard checks (> now deadline), so evidence at t=1120 is NOT past the deadline (1120 is not > 1120), and is accepted. Tests strict-greater-than boundary.
